video_job.actor_prompt: Japanese fantasy RPG guild forge, warm wood interior. Yuna Brightford, a masculine quartermaster in a neat vest and guild sash, stands at a workbench holding a shield steady. Yuna Silverbrook, an androgynous guild coordinator in a formal cloak, stands beside them, carefully guiding a safe repair tool along the shield's edge. Warm forge light, cooperative teamwork, clear body language, no text, no watermark, anime fantasy style.
video_job.target_continuation_prompt: Same continuous forge shot, consistent lighting and characters. Yuna Silverbrook taps the final harmless repair mark on the shield while Yuna Brightford maintains a steady grip. Friendly interaction, clear tool motion, warm atmosphere, no text, no watermark, high-quality anime fantasy RPG aesthetic.
video_job.safety_notes: The prompts depict professional, non-sexual cooperation between two characters in a fantasy setting. No harmful, violent, or inappropriate content is included.

timeline_story.selection_reason: The Quartermaster and Coordinator are both present in the forge, providing an opportunity to cooperatively maintain guild equipment.
